summary: Fans lament the missing official release of the 4/29/71 show, offering no details on sound or performance.
review: All three reviewers focus exclusively on the fact that this concert has never been issued in full and criticize the record company's handling of archival releases. No comments are made about the audio source, mix quality, or specific musical moments, leaving the actual recording and performance qualities unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews provide no information on sound quality or musical performance; they only express frustration over unavailability, leading to a low‑confidence rating based primarily on negative sentiment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer mentions the audio source, clarity, or mix; discussion is limited to the lack of an official release.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers claim the 4/29 show is superior to others in the era but give no concrete details on set structure or performance.
